name: the-terminal
description: Market workspace with a Flask backend, SQLite persistence, and a browser terminal client

scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -x ./.venv/bin/python ]; then ./.venv/bin/python backend/app.py; else python3 backend/app.py; fi'
scripts.check: sh -c 'if [ -x ./.venv/bin/python ]; then ./.venv/bin/python scripts/smoke_test.py; else python3 scripts/smoke_test.py; fi'
scripts.test: node --input-type=module < tests/CommandLexer.test.js && node --input-type=module < tests/LogicEngine.test.js && python3 -m unittest discover tests -v
